context: Tests whether the background-processing skill guidance is applied to BGTaskScheduler registration, plist setup, expiration, completion, and rescheduling.

checklist.name: Launch registration
checklist.description: States that BGTaskScheduler launch handlers must be registered before app launch completes, such as in App initialization or UIApplicationDelegate launch, not from a view task.

checklist.name: Permitted identifiers
checklist.description: Requires every submitted task identifier to be listed under BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers and keeps code/plist strings aligned.

checklist.name: Background modes
checklist.description: Requires the appropriate UIBackgroundModes values: fetch for BGAppRefreshTask and processing for BGProcessingTask.

checklist.name: Expiration handling
checklist.description: Adds an expirationHandler that cancels or stops in-flight work and handles cleanup.

checklist.name: Completion reporting
checklist.description: Calls setTaskCompleted(success:) on success, failure, and expiration paths.

checklist.name: Rescheduling pattern
checklist.description: Schedules the next request from inside the task handler rather than assuming one submission repeats forever.

checklist.name: Reasonable timing
checklist.description: Treats earliestBeginDate as a hint and avoids promising exact launch times or overly frequent refreshes.

checklist.name: Scope control
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on BackgroundTasks setup rather than drifting into unrelated app architecture.
